title: Senior Revenue Manager at OYO Rooms

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at OYO Rooms
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, OYO Rooms in Srinagar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!
